action.reasoning: The previous action failed because the final integration subtask (root.6) attempted to write to 'root/business_plan', which violates the namespace discipline rule requiring outputs to be under the subtask's own namespace (root.6/). To fix this, I will change the output path of root.6 to 'root.6/business_plan'. Since the parent assigned no specific interface paths (EXPECTED OUTPUTS FROM PARENT: []), this change is valid and satisfies the constraint that outputs must be under the subtask's namespace. The decomposition remains valid: 5 parallel research tasks and 1 sequential integration task.

subtasks.goal: Conduct market analysis for a Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask analyzes the Korean market size, growth trends, user demographics, and regulatory environment for local review platforms. It provides the foundational context for the business plan.

outputs.description: Detailed market analysis including TAM, SAM, SOM, and key trends in the Korean local services sector.

subtasks.goal: Perform competitor analysis for the Korean local-review landscape.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask identifies key competitors like Naver Maps, KakaoMap, and specialized review sites, analyzing their strengths, weaknesses, and market share. It helps define the competitive positioning for the new platform.

outputs.description: Detailed competitor analysis including feature comparison, SWOT analysis, and market positioning.

subtasks.goal: Develop the revenue model for the platform.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask defines how the platform will make money, exploring options like advertising, premium listings, affiliate marketing, and data services. It establishes the financial viability of the business.

outputs.description: Detailed revenue model including pricing strategies, revenue streams, and unit economics.

subtasks.goal: Create a go-to-market strategy for the platform.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask outlines the launch strategy, user acquisition channels, marketing tactics, and partnership opportunities specific to the Korean market. It details how the platform will gain initial traction.

outputs.description: Comprehensive go-to-market strategy including launch phases, marketing channels, and user acquisition plans.

subtasks.goal: Generate financial projections for the first 5 years.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask creates detailed financial forecasts including income statements, cash flow, and balance sheets. It provides the quantitative basis for investment decisions and operational planning.

outputs.description: 5-year financial projections including P&L, cash flow, and key financial metrics.

subtasks.goal: Integrate all components into a complete business plan.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask synthesizes the market analysis, competitor analysis, revenue model, go-to-market strategy, and financial projections into a single, cohesive business plan document. It ensures consistency and flow across all sections.

outputs.description: Complete, integrated business plan document for the Korean local-review platform.

subtasks.condition: done("root.1/market_analysis") AND done("root.2/competitor_analysis") AND done("root.3/revenue_model") AND done("root.4/go_to_market") AND done("root.5/financial_projections")
